title: tournefortia calycina
intro: Tournefortia calycina is a tropical plant species known for its medicinal and ornamental properties. It is a type of flowering plant in the family Boraginaceae, commonly found in Central and South America. The plant is rich in flavonoids and saponins, which have anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Tournefortia calycina include treating fever, cough, and respiratory infections, and it can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for consumption.
